pages.name: INTRO
pages.snark: oh no. he made a website.

boxes.text: Just Click -> to go forward or click <- to go back

Dash found a notebook.
Dash claimed the notebook.
But the notebook is also my website. 
So we have to share this space

THE DOODLE DUELIST
armed (one sword). Extremely Dangerous.
last seen leaving the page, airborne. But he always comes back

pages.name: ABOUT
pages.snark: the sword is foam. don't tell him.

boxes.text:
Hi! I'm Vasim. Welcome to my website. This website is a bit about me, a bit me having fun and building, and a bit about the people in my life that matter to me (More on that soon!) For now, let me introduce myself. I'm an optimist & software engineer living out in Seattle (7 years now!) but I was born & raised in North Bergen NJ. I've got three brothers, and I'm right in the middle at #3. I love learning, exploring, technology, history, politics, literature and a million things in between. 
Tl;DR: I'm Vasim & have fun w/Dash

Our Panel Is UNDER ATTACK!
Our Hero Boldly Defends it

✓ Always pursuing my next best cup of coffee
✓I love riding a bike, but I didn't learn till I was 22 & in Amsterdam
✓My name rhymes with my brothers' names
✓Seattle 2019 - Present Day
✓ I have a massive sweet tooth
✓Serial Hobbyist 
- Including: Video Games, Reading, Audiobook Listening, Long City Walks, Boxing, Muay Thai, Bouldering, Kayaking, Snowboarding

Extremeley Handsome
Extremely Brave
Master of Parkour
Unbound by Gravity

× Dash Bandicoot
× The Notebook (taken)
× Vasim Rising
× untitled_final_v9_FINAL
Welcome To Dash's Garden...it's a work in progress

boxes.text: I'll fill these out soon! If you're here before I've done this, congrats! You're one of my first visitors! More to come in the future, but checkout the sketchbook at the end, if you want a spot, shoot me a message :)

day 2: fell off faster. progress.
day 47: the rope apologized.

"dear dash — are you a stick figure?"

open: whenever this page is.
closed: never. he lives here.
